title: chenopodium × murri
intro: Chenopodium × murri is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Chenopodium album and Chenopodium ambrosioides, belonging to the amaranth family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chenopodium × murri include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
